subcodes.first_line: O spiritual assembly! I beseech the divine Threshold of the All-Merciful to assist you with holy breathings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المجمع الروحانی انی ابتهل الی العتبه الرحمانیه ان یویدکم بنفحات مقدسه
subcodes.subjects: @Hands of the Cause, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
